name: Patient 27
history: Recent divorce with financial difficulties. Relationship since 19. Young son, settling child support. Adjusting to single life.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: Divorce makes me a failure and less desirable.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll always be seen as the divorced mom, not a whole person.
coping_strategies: Maintaining appearances, avoiding divorce topic, overcompensating as parent.
situation: At birthday party, guests mention divorce during casual conversation.
auto_thought: "They're pitying me. I'm the sad divorcee story. They think I failed."
behavior: Forces cheerful smile, changes subject to son's achievements, leaves party early.
